summary: Iteration 112: Validated Book Export & Interactive Book features. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Interactive Book page working with navigation, keyboard support, touch/swipe, and TTS toggle. All book endpoints accessible (interactive-data returns 43 pages, PDF returns 27MB file). StoryboardEditor has all 3 book export buttons with correct data-testid. Inpainting layout fix verified (h-8 sizing). Token storage uses 'agentzz_token' key.
critical_code_review_comments: book_generator.py: Has all 4 required functions (generate_cover_image, generate_creative_title, generate_pdf_storybook, build_interactive_book_data)
book_generator.py: Uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for Gemini cover generation and Claude title generation
InteractiveBook.jsx: Has data-testid for interactive-book, toggle-narration, prev-page-btn, next-page-btn
InteractiveBook.jsx: Has keyboard navigation (ArrowLeft, ArrowRight), touch/swipe support (onTouchStart, onTouchEnd)
StoryboardEditor.jsx: Has 3 book export buttons with data-testid (generate-cover-btn, export-pdf-btn, open-interactive-book-btn)
StoryboardEditor.jsx: Inpainting VoiceInput has h-8 w-8 sizing (line 595), Edit button has h-8 sizing (line 601)
App.js: Has route /book/:projectId for InteractiveBook component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 112 verified: 1) Book export endpoints all working (interactive-data returns 43 pages, PDF returns 27MB), 2) Interactive Book page at /book/:projectId works with navigation, keyboard, touch/swipe, TTS toggle, 3) StoryboardEditor has 3 book export buttons (generate-cover-btn, export-pdf-btn, open-interactive-book-btn), 4) Inpainting layout fix verified (h-8 sizing for mic and edit buttons), 5) Token storage uses 'agentzz_token' key. DO NOT test cover generation (costs Gemini credits). DO NOT test TTS (costs ElevenLabs credits).
